title: Pulsetech
description: A tech mod based on sending information with pulsed Redstone
body:
**Pulsetech** is a tech mod built around transmitting data using pulses of Redstone signal. With this technique, information such as commands and parameters can be sent over a single line of vanilla Redstone, and be used to coordinate the actions of complex machines. ## Video Overview ## Features ![Three Pattern Emitters, linked to three Pattern Detectors by a single Redstone line. The center Detector is powered, and the center Emitter is showing an output.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83308a38a95c5f9dd10edb00ed56d5c0a2554fca_0.webp) With the Pattern Emitter and Pattern Detector, hundreds of distinct codes can be sent over a single line of Redstone dust and used to trigger many different machines. Connect Redstone contraptions all over your world to a network that can be controlled from a single place! Pulsetech also adds a few machines to add some power to your pulsed-Redstone creations: the destructive Coil Cannon, the Screen, the Scanner, and the Orb Projector. With these, you can break and place blocks automatically, sense nearby mobs, create intricate display systems, and even grab and move entities. Each of these is operated using a set of **commands**, which are also pulse patterns. To control all these machines, Pulsetech offers an easy-to-use scripting language, available via the Console. With support for macros and parameters, the Console allows you to control your entire base from a single command prompt. ## Documentation Pulsetech comes with Ponder built-in as its method of easily learning what each block does and how to use them. ![A screenshot of the Ponder interface, demonstrating a tutorial for using the Orb Projector, a block from Pulsetech](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6b6142041f45a15ec675241bd36f5e278e43f4.png) Any block with a list of commands will also have full, in-depth documentation of those commands in its **Datasheet**, accessible by clicking it with the Datasheet item in-game. ![A Datasheet for the "Screen" block showing commands to SET BG, CLEAR BG, and SET PEN COLOR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5591982b9fd4df07a65f6cf2d1ec3a7d1960f498.png) ## Compatibility Pulsetech should work with any other redstone mod out of the box! Support has been specifically tested and verified for: - [Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current) If my other mod [Reactive Alchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive) is present, Pulsetech will change a couple of its own recipes to use Reactive's crafting system. Also, as a reminder, this mod does NOT require Create because it bundles Ponder on its own. Create will still work with this mod installed, however! If Ponder updates within Create, the newest version will be used between the two mods, so there should be no problem. ## Usage Feel free to use Pulsetech in any modpack! Just don't pretend to be the mod's author or sell your pack commercially for some money amount. This mod is under the **CC-BY-NC-4.0** license.

Support

If you encounter a bug or have a suggestion, please send it to the issues page! I'm making this as a side project, so updates and ports will occur only when I have time.

If you have some other feedback or want to ask me a question about the mod, you can contact `dev@hyperlynx.dev`. [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/G2G416CQBR)
